decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and pump spells, taking advantage of the mono green aggro archetype. The deck has a low mana curve to ensure a quick start and plenty of creatures to maintain pressure on the opponent. Key cards include Earthbender Ascension, Mightform Harmonizer, and Sazh's Chocobo for buffing and generating additional value. The inclusion of Esper Origins and Fabled Passage allows for some card advantage and fixing. Escape Tunnel and Promising Vein provide additional versatility and evasion options.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced aggressive strategy using a combination of cheap and efficient creatures, versatile spells, and card draw. By quickly developing a board presence with creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, and controlling the battlefield with spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, this deck aims to apply continuous pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of card draw spells like Sleight of Hand and Opt ensures consistency and helps maintain momentum throughout the match.

The key strategy of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with low-cost flying creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, supported by cards like Springleaf Drum and Floodfarm Verge to ramp up mana. The deck also utilizes control elements such as Parting Gust and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's plays, while cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd provide additional utility and synergy with other creatures. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and strategic control moves.

The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures and spells, while also utilizing bounce effects to control the board. It aims to be aggressive and overwhelming by playing efficient creatures like Elusive Otter and using spells like Burst Lightning for direct damage. The deck also includes card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain hand advantage. With an emphasis on tempo and aggression, the deck looks to quickly establish board presence and pressure the opponent into making unfavorable trades or decisions.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on maintaining control of the board through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. It looks to slow down the opponent's game plan while also generating card advantage through various spell effects. By efficiently managing resources and strategically responding to threats, the deck aims to outlast opponents and ultimately win the game through card advantage and tempo control. With a mix of spells that can deal with creatures, disrupt opponents' strategies, and draw additional cards, the deck seeks to stay ahead of the opponent and secure a victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with cheap spells and creatures. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and Stormchaser's Talent to buff your creatures, you can apply constant pressure. The inclusion of Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter adds some versatility to the deck, while Stock Up and Sleight of Hand help you draw into your key pieces. The goal is to be aggressive early on and maintain control of the game until you can secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing spells and creatures to control the game by denying opponents resources and disrupting their strategy. It includes cards that allow for card draw, counter spells, and removal options to maintain board control. The creatures in the deck also provide additional control elements with abilities that can slow down opponents or deal damage. The aim is to outlast opponents by frustrating their efforts to establish a strong board presence, eventually gaining the upper hand and securing victory.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful combo utilizing Omniscience and various creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent. The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Uthros, Titanic Godcore and Evendo, Waking Haven, while also utilizing protection with cards like Spell Pierce and Abrade. Once Omniscience is on the field, the deck can play multiple spells in a single turn without having to pay their mana costs, allowing for a potentially game-winning combo to be executed. The deck aims to control the board and set up for a decisive victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy utilizing creatures with low mana cost and high power. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to ramp up mana quickly, the deck can flood the board with threats like Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Mightform Harmonizer help to push through damage and close out games quickly. Overall, the goal is to apply constant pressure and finish the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play powerful creatures like Mightform Harmonizer and Ba Sing Se. It also incorporates cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Sazh's Chocobo to pump up creatures and push for early aggression. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a flood of efficient creatures and use cards like Escape Tunnel to protect key threats. Overall, the strategy revolves around building a strong board presence quickly and pushing for a fast win.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes various spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and protect its creatures. Additionally, the deck features cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Stock Up to draw additional cards and maintain card advantage. Overall, the key strategy is to apply constant pressure on the opponent while also having the versatility to control the game when needed.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the board through various spells and abilities, utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Boomerang Basics, and Combustion Technique to disrupt opponents and maintain a strong defensive position. The deck also features a mix of card draw and mana ramp with Accumulate Wisdom and Monument to Endurance, allowing for consistent resource management. Additionally, the inclusion of Agna Qel'a and Firebending Lesson provides additional ways to handle threats and exert dominance over the battlefield. By combining these elements, the deck aims to outlast opponents and secure victory through strategic control.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to play powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Icetill Explorer early on. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional buffs to creatures, while Escape Tunnel and Sapling Nursery provide protection and ways to generate more creatures. Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Webstrike Elite offer removal options, while Ba Sing Se and Promising Vein help to maintain card advantage. Finally, Sazh's Chocobo and Archdruid's Charm offer additional utility and card draw options to keep up the pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counter spells. The deck focuses on efficiency and versatility, using cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom to gain card advantage, while utilizing cards like Artist's Talent and Firebending Lesson to remove threats from the opponent. Additionally, cards like Iroh's Demonstration and It'll Quench Ya! provide extra utility and enable the player to maintain control of the board. Overall, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on combining powerful creatures from the graveyard with various spells and abilities to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Restless Reef and Watery Grave to bring back creatures, as well as Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the player aims to control the battlefield and set up a game-winning combo. Cards like Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice help fuel the reanimation engine, while spells like Doomsday Excruciator and Stock Up provide additional power and control options. Ultimately, the goal is to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory through strategic plays and synergy.

The deck focuses on fast mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator to quickly cast powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ouroboroid. The deck also utilizes Hushwood Verge and Multiversal Passage for color fixing, and Nature's Rhythm to untap lands for extra mana. Mockingbird and Quantum Riddler provide card advantage and disruption, while Seam Rip and Spider Manifestation help control the board. Brightglass Gearhulk serves as a finisher, while cards like Beza, the Bounding Spring and Unable to Scream offer protection and evasion. Overall, the strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with early aggression and powerful creatures.
